activePackageManagerOverrides.rationale: Force AJV's transitive URI parser onto the patched version that resolves GHSA-q3j6-qgpj-74h6 and GHSA-v39h-62p7-jpjc while keeping `ajv@8.20.0` pinned.
activePackageManagerOverrides.removalCondition: Remove when `ajv` or the lockfile resolves `fast-uri >=3.1.2` without a root override.

activePackageManagerOverrides.rationale: Keep IWSDK sidecar and production XR packages on one reviewed Three.js version while `@iwsdk/core` permits a broad Three.js range.
activePackageManagerOverrides.removalCondition: Remove when all workspace packages declare the same exact Three.js version without a root override.

activePackageManagerOverrides.rationale: Keep packaging and local preview bundling aligned while the existing build scripts are validated against this pinned `rolldown` version.
activePackageManagerOverrides.removalCondition: Remove when the full stack lockfile and workspace overrides can be moved to a newer pinned version after compatibility validation.
